title: MNLU Mumbai hosts 1st International Labour Law Conference on New Labour Codes
description: Maharashtra National Law University, Mumbai (MNLU Mumbai) organised the 1st International Labour Law Conference on the theme 'New Labour Codes in India: Contemporary Issues, Implementation Challenges and Global Perspectives' at its campus on April 6, 2026. The conference brought together distinguished academicians, judges, policymakers, labour law experts, professionals, and researchers from India and abroad.
